title: Design roadmap-taskboard context packet
description: Define the machine-readable packet for task dispatch. Include roadmap binding, docs, code scope, tests, workflow contract, and artifacts. Produce one example payload and a gap list versus current MCC implementation.

title: Add roadmap binding fields to TaskBoard task model
description: Extend TaskBoard tasks with roadmap binding fields while preserving compatibility with existing adapters and MCC routes. Keep fields optional and serializable.

title: Add MCC task context packet endpoint
description: Add an API endpoint that resolves task, roadmap binding, workflow contract, docs, tests, and artifacts into one dispatch packet for agents.

title: Add roadmap to taskboard task generator tool path
description: Formalize roadmap node to task template to TaskBoard entry flow. Preserve node bindings and docs. Keep generated tasks narrow and import-safe.

title: Sync TaskBoard completion back into roadmap progress
description: When task status or verifier outcome changes, update roadmap execution state so roadmap progress no longer requires manual bookkeeping.

title: LiteRT feasibility on Apple Silicon
description: Verify LiteRT build and run path on macOS Apple Silicon, document supported acceleration paths for our environment, and recommend adopt, benchmark-only, or drop.

title: LiteRT vs current local stack benchmark pack
description: Build a comparable benchmark pack for LiteRT versus the current local runtime. Compare latency, runtime stability, artifact overhead, and summary metrics using MCC-compatible output.

title: Add LiteRT benchmark lane to MCC metrics surface
description: Expose LiteRT benchmark results through the same summary surface used for localguys. Avoid a separate dashboard and keep schema aligned with the benchmark summary endpoint style.
